title: Oulu Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Oulu, with extremely low temperatures. This event has a critical level with a Z-Score of -3.66.
body:
The current weather conditions in Oulu are characterized by a significant drop in temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The relative humidity is at 76%, and the wind speed is 19.4 km/h, making the cold feel even more intense. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 13.8 GG, indicating a high demand for heating, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 0.0 GG, as no cooling is needed.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
